utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six of these items are present. Each one is fully specified: property includes details and price; financing has terms, loan details, and costs; legal_services includes description and cost; moving_services includes description and cost; setup_services includes description and cost; total_budget includes cost breakdowns and sums. There is also an extra item (other_closing_costs) that is not part of the required format, but that does not affect completeness. Therefore, all 6 required items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property named 'The Innovator Suite' priced at 480,000 CAD with 95 sqm size. Among the ground-truth purchase properties, 'New Build' has the same price (480K) and size (95m²), which fits perfectly. Therefore, 'The Innovator Suite' corresponds to 'New Build' (rating 10). The financing solution is a 'Mortgage' with 20% down payment and 1,200 CAD fee, which aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (arrangement_fee: 1,200, rating 8). The legal services cost 800 CAD, matching 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving services cost 650 CAD, which corresponds to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The setup services cost 120 CAD, aligning with 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6). The other closing costs of 300 CAD match 'Basic Survey' (rating 9).
